questions.q: According to late April 2026 news, the director of which popular MMO stated he would 'love to hear pitches' for a single-player spin-off of the game?
On April 25, 2026, the first teaser trailer for Season 4 of 'Star Trek: Strange New Worlds' was unveiled by cast members at which event?
The American Library Association's list of most challenged books, covered in news reports on April 25, 2026, saw which John Green boarding school narrative tied for eighth place?
In late April 2026, researchers published findings on a THC-free cannabis compound that shows promise in replacing what class of highly addictive drugs?
Which Los Angeles Lakers player scored 29 points, including a tying 3-pointer with 13 seconds left in regulation, to help secure a 112-108 overtime win and a 3-0 series lead over the Houston Rockets?
According to an April 2026 environmental health report, 1 in 5 Americans are exposed to what tasteless, odorless toxin linked to multiple cancers in their tap water?

During a 35th-anniversary retrospective published in April 2026, screenwriter Ted Tally revealed that which Oscar-winning actor originally bought the rights to 'The Silence of the Lambs' with plans to direct and star as Hannibal Lecter?
Who took a 5-shot lead into the final round of the 2026 Chevron Championship after shooting a third-round 70?
On April 25, 2026, a nude statue of the late Monty Python star Terry Jones was unveiled in Colwyn Bay. Which of his famous characters does the monument depict?
In an April 2026 interview, 'Backrooms' director Kane Parsons revealed that the film's production crew built an actual physical set measuring how large?
